message:
feat(lexer): add Structure-of-Arrays token/span storage (bd-2mds.1.3.2)

Introduce TokenSpanStorage type in the SIMD lexer that stores token
kinds and span columns in separate contiguous arrays for cache-local
layout during hot-path token iteration. Includes bidirectional
conversion to/from the existing Vec<Token> API so callers can opt into
SoA layout where it improves throughput without breaking compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
